svg.title: MX Master 4 — LinguaX slot layout
svg.desc: Top-down photo of the MX Master 4 with LinguaX slots labelled: T Gesture button, S1 / S2 side buttons, WL / WR thumb wheel, and AR Actions Ring on the thumb wing; M wheel click and SM scroll-mode key on the top.
svg.text: MX Master 4 — 10 configurable slots (adds AR vs the 3S)
